data.title: BNB Drops Below 920 USDT with a 0.09% Decrease in 24 Hours

data.title: Tether in Advanced Talks for €1 Billion Investment in Humanoid-Robotics Firm Neura Robotics
data.description:
Tether, the issuer of the world’s largest stablecoin USDT, is reportedly close to finalizing a major investment in the German humanoid-robotics startup Neura Robotics.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/tether-in-advanced-talks-for-e1-billion-investment-in-humanoid-robotics-firm-neura-robotics/

data.title: Oklahoma Man Lands 5 Years Behind Bars For Nearly $10 Million Crypto Scheme
data.description:
The DOJ has sentenced Oklahoma resident Travis Ford, CEO of Wolf Capital, to 60 months in prison for a $9. 4M crypto scheme. Ford has admitted he has not believed the promised daily returns were achievable and Wolf Capital has lost investor funds, leading to forfeiture and restitution orders.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/oklahoma-man-lands-5-years-behind-bars-for-nearly-10-million-crypto-scheme/

data.title: SOL drops to 5-month low despite Solana spot ETF success: Is $100 next?
data.description:
Solana ETFs recorded inflows for 13 consecutive days, but SOL price lost key technical support levels, sparking fears of a drop to $100.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sol-drops-to-5-month-low-despite-solana-spot-etf-success-is-dollar100-next?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: DOJ Seizes $15M in Crypto as North Korea’s Fake Remote-Worker Scheme Unravels
data.description:
The U. S. Department of Justice (DOJ) has intensified its campaign against North Korea’s illicit revenue networks, securing new criminal convictions and seizing an additional $15 million in cryptocurrency linked to the regime’s fraud operations
source: https://www.ethnews.com/doj-seizes-15m-in-crypto-as-north-koreas-fake-remote-worker-scheme-unravels/

data.title: Probability of December interest rate cut falls below 50%
data.description:
Nearly 67% of investors forecast an interest rate cut of 25 basis points in December when polled during the first week of November.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/probability-december-interest-rate-cut-below-50?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Nexperia denies production meddling as conflict with China arm deepens
data.description:
Nexperia said on Friday it’s not to blame for any stalled production in China, firmly rejecting accusations from its Chinese division that it’s been choking wafer supplies and leaving operations without funding. The Dutch chipmaker said its China unit has plenty of wafers and finished chips to keep going “for several months,” and suggested poor […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nexperia-denies-china-production-meddling/

data.title: Bitcoin: Which Is the Real Force Behind Its Price Moves, According to VanEc
data.description:
Bitcoin’s long-term price cycles continue to track global liquidity conditions, according to new research highlighted by VanEck. The asset manager reports that more than 50% of Bitcoin’s price movements since 2014 are directly tied to global M2 liquidity trends, a measure of broad money supply across major economies.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-which-is-the-real-force-behind-its-price-moves-according-to-vanec/

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/btcs-posts-record-q3-revenue/

data.title: Solana Core Evolution: Here’s The Underrated Impact Of The BIT Narrative
data.description:
Solana is evolving faster than most market participants realize, and it has been celebrated for its blistering speed and low transaction costs. The BIT narrative movement within the SOL ecosystem is quietly driving a core evolution of the platform, cementing the network’s position as a leading blockchain. How BIT Is Reshaping The Solana Infrastructure BIT is quietly becoming one of Solana’s most underrated narratives right now. An analyst known as CryptoDoc has revealed on X that Bitdealernet is building an asset-backed meme launchpad, where every token launch on their platform is tied to real iGaming products with millions of active players
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/solana-core-evolution/

data.title: America’s Dollar Has Fallen 97% in Value Since 1913: Why Inflation Never Stops Winning
data.description:
For more than a century, the U. S. dollar has been considered one of the world’s strongest and most reliable currencies. It dominates global trade, sits at the core of international reserves, and acts as the default store of value for governments and institutions
source: https://www.ethnews.com/americas-dollar-has-fallen-97-in-value-since-1913-why-inflation-never-stops-winning/

data.title: SAP set to dodge EU hammer in antitrust probe
data.description:
The European Commission plans to run a market test to determine whether or not SAP will pay antitrust fines. SAP is set to settle with the European Commission if it can confirm through feedback from customers and competitors that the company intends to comply with its competition rules. SAP is close to settling with the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sap-dodge-eu-hammer-in-antitrust-probe/

data.title: Wolf Capital founder hit with 5-year sentence, $1M+ forfeiture over $9.4M Ponzi scheme
data.description:
A US court has sentenced Travis Ford, the founder and head trader behind Wolf Capital Crypto Trading LLC, to five years in prison. According to the United States Department of Justice (DOJ), Ford must also forfeit more than $1 million and repay over $170,000 in restitution. Fraudulent promises land Wolf Capital’s founder in trouble From […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wolf-capital-founder-sentence-ponzi-scheme/

data.title: Bitcoin miners retreat sharply as BTC pulls back from recent highs
data.description:
